prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 内蒙古大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳步上升，2026年约第114名，属中后段211层次。\ n该校在近年声誉评价中未出现明显正面或负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第101位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量较低；未见投档线断档记录，报考心理整体平 稳；第五轮学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以计算机、软件工程、电子信息、 机械、土木、化学、生物等工科为主，其中计算机类/电子信息/电气工程社会热度高热推荐，土木建筑/生化环材明显劝退；广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年增加 约3.6%，考生规模温和增长；内蒙古大学位于呼和浩特，距广东较远，地域偏好对广东考生吸引力一般；该校在广东物理类招生 占比约1%–2%，属跨省招生中偏小规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次99935名、2026年物理类计划扩招30.3%（大幅缓解竞争）、广东省物理类考生增加3.6%（温和加剧 竞争）以及学校层次与地域偏好的综合影响，扩招效应显著大于考生增加效应，但近年位次持续后移趋势明显；预测2026年物理类最低位次约118129名，区间117629–118629名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 63443 → 69968 → 77623 → 84001 → 99935, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 36492 over the past 5 years and accelerated backward shift in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 99935; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 41 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 65 in 2024, and 76 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 99, an expansion of about 30.3% compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of significant expansion, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has steadily risen in recent years, reaching about 114th in 2026, placing it in the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities. In recent years, there have been no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents in its reputation evaluation; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure; no record of admission score line breaks has been observed, and the overall application psychology is stable; fifth round of disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category majors mainly include Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Chemistry, Biology, etc., among which Computer Science/Electronic Information/Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity, while Civil Engineering/Architecture/Biology/Chemistry/Environmental/Materials are clearly discouraged; the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, with moderate growth; Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Guangdong, and regional preference has average appeal to Guangdong examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong Physics Category is about 1%–2%, a relatively small scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 99935, the 30.3% expansion of Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (significantly easing competition), the 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees (moderately intensifying competition), and the combined effects of university level and regional preference, the expansion effect is significantly greater than the examinee increase effect, but the recent continuous backward trend in rankings is evident; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 118129, with a range of 117629–118629.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 117629–118629, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 117000), prioritize competitive majors like Computer Science and Software Engineering; if the ranking is close to the upper limit, mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors and avoid clearly discouraged majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has steadily risen in recent years, reaching approximately 114th in 2026, placing it in the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities; the university has not experienced significant positive or negative public opinion events in recent reputation evaluations; its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure; no record of admission cutoff line breaks has been observed, and the application psychology is generally stable; fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category majors mainly include Law, Chinese Language and Literature, History, Journalism, Foreign Languages, and other liberal arts; the social popularity of related major categories is polarized (Law is relatively hot, Foreign Languages are stable, Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged); the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province in 2026 is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool; Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Guangdong, and regional preference has average appeal to Guangdong examinees; the university's History Category enrollment in Guangdong accounts for about 0.5%–1%, a relatively small scale among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 18892, the 35% expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026 (significantly easing competition), the 11.6% increase in History Category examinees in Guangdong Province (intensifying competition), and the comprehensive impact of university level and regional preference, the expansion effect outweighs the examinee increase effect, but the growth in examinee numbers still exerts upward pressure; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 22909, with a range of 22409–23409.
